parameters.content:
## One-time: create the 3 CWSI master Slides templates

Creates **CWSI Board Pack / KPI / Pipeline** template decks via the Slides API, with every
`{{token}}` and `[[CHART]]` placeholder already laid out and named (Manrope, navy cover).

### SETUP (after import)
1. On BOTH HTTP nodes, pick your **Google OAuth2** credential (scopes: presentations + drive).
2. Click **Execute workflow**.
3. Open the **Template IDs** node output → copy the 3 `TEMPLATE_ID` values and send them to me.

### THEN (by hand, 5 min) — the API can't do these:
- On each **cover** slide: swap the solid-navy background for the gradient/photo, drop in the
  white `CWSI.` logo. (The text tokens are already there.)
- Optional: nudge boxes / restyle to taste. Keep the `{{tokens}}` and `[[CHART]]` text EXACTLY
  as generated — the fill workflow matches them verbatim.

Read-only to your data — only creates 3 Drive files. Safe to re-run (makes 3 new decks each time).
